Fercho The Barber · New York City

More than a cut —
it's a declaration
of who you are.

— FERCHO THE BARBER

Barber Battle Royale Special Guest

The Story

Built from
the culture.

Fercho didn't follow a path — he cut his own. Starting from the streets of New York, he built a reputation not just for precision cuts, but for the energy, authenticity, and respect he brings to every client in the chair.

What started as a passion became a craft, and what became a craft became a movement. FERCHO The Barber is where barbering tradition meets street culture — where every detail matters and nothing is generic.

Today, Fercho is recognized across the industry — competing at national barber expos, collaborating with top artists, and building a brand that speaks to anyone who believes that everything is possible.

5+
Years in the game
NYC
Based & rooted
∞
Everything possible

What drives the brand

The Four Pillars

01
✦

Autenticidad

Authenticity

Every service, every detail, every experience stays true to a unique personality. No templates. No filters. Just real connection with every client.

02
◈

Estilo

Style

More than a cut — it's a declaration of style. Attention to trends, care for aesthetics, and personalization of the look as personal expression.

03
⬡

Profesionalismo

Professionalism

Excellence in every aspect. From punctuality to technique mastery — constant quality, impeccable hygiene, and personalized attention every time.

04
◎

Tradición

Tradition

Rooted in the classic rituals of barbering that have defined the profession for generations — combined with a fresh, modern vision.

Ready to experience
the Fercho difference?

Whether you're booking your first cut, grabbing merch, or looking to collaborate — this is where it starts. Pull up. Let's build something real.

Fercho The Barber · Official Partners

Built on
Real
Connections.

Every partnership is chosen for what it adds to the culture — not just the brand. These are the teams and brands that Fercho trusts in the chair and beyond it.

02 Official Partners
01
Barber Competition · Media

Barbermania

The premier barber competition series bringing raw, unfiltered barbershop culture to the big stage. Head-to-head skill battles judged by the industry's top names — Fercho competes, judges, and represents on this platform.

Visit Barbermania
02
Professional Tools · Equipment

G&B Pro

G&BPRO redefines mobile barbering with patented, professional-grade workstations and tools built for barbers on the move. Their innovative Mobile Barber Stations let Fercho set up and perform anywhere — in minutes.

Visit G&B Pro

Brand Partnerships & Collaborations

Interested in partnering with Fercho The Barber? Tell us about your brand.

Proposal received ✦ We'll review your submission and get back to you within 48 hours.

Frequently Asked

Got Questions?

Everything you need to know before your first visit, your first order, or your first collab.

How do I book an appointment? +

All appointments are booked online through our booking system — no walk-ins. Click "Book Now" in the nav or visit the Services page. Select your service, pick your time slot, and you'll receive instant confirmation. If you have questions before booking, DM on Instagram.

Where is the shop located? +

5504 Hudson Ave, West New York, NJ 07093. We're open 7 days a week from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM (hours vary by day). Parking is available on the street. NJ Transit accessible.

What are your hours? +

Open every day — Monday through Sunday — from 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM depending on the day. Holiday hours may vary. Check Instagram stories for any schedule changes in real time.

What's your cancellation policy? +

Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance. Late cancellations or no-shows may result in a fee. We respect your time — please respect ours.

How long does shipping take for merch? +

Domestic US orders typically ship within 3–5 business days. International orders take 7–14 business days depending on destination. You'll receive tracking info by email once your order ships.

Can I return or exchange merch? +

Unused items in original condition can be exchanged within 14 days of delivery. We don't accept returns on worn items or final sale pieces. For exchanges or issues, email ferneylopezpatino6@gmail.com.

How do I apply for a collaboration? +

Use the contact form on this page and select "Partnership / Collaboration" as the reason. Give us a brief intro of your brand, the type of collab you have in mind, and the best way to reach you. We read every message and respond to the right fits.

Do you travel for events or shoots? +

Yes — Fercho is available for barber events, competitions, brand activations, and on-location shoots. Reach out through the contact form with your event details and dates.
